reason: Official Ukrainian PDR clause 8.7.5 tram-signal illustration (from the PDR rulebook catalog via green-way.com.ua /storage/app/media/books/pdd-ukr/razdel_8/8-7-5-svitlofory.jpg). Shows the special tram traffic signal: trapezoid housing with four white-moonlight round signals in the T/triangle arrangement (three across the top, one below center), in off and lit states. Exactly matches PDR 8.7; answer 'Трамваїв'. Converted JPG->PNG, verified visually. Wikimedia tram photos (Moscow orange-T LED, Minsk LED icon+arrow) did NOT match the classic 4-white-light T design; the watermarked testpdr gov-theory scene was rejected for the clean official schematic.
